mapper.select:
SELECT A.*, C.total_participants, B.nickname,
CASE WHEN A.status = 'RECRUITING' THEN '모집중' WHEN A.status = 'CLOSED' THEN '모집마감' END AS status_name, D.name AS sigungu_name, E.name AS sido_name, TO_CHAR(A.meetup_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS formatted_meetup_at, F.category_name,
CASE WHEN H.member_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS has_like, I.like_cnt FROM meetups A LEFT JOIN members B ON B.member_id = A.member_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT meetup_id, COUNT(*) AS total_participants FROM meetup_applications WHERE 1=1 AND status ='APPROVED' AND delete_yn = 'N' GROUP BY meetup_id ) C ON C.meetup_id = A.meetup_id
LEFT JOIN sigungus D ON D.sigungu_id = A.sigungu_id LEFT JOIN sidos E ON E.sido_id = D.sido_id LEFT JOIN categories F ON F.category_id = A.category_id LEFT JOIN categories G ON G.category_id = F.parent_id LEFT JOIN meetup_likes H ON H.meetup_id = A.meetup_id AND H.member_id = A.member_id LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(meetup_id) as like_cnt, meetup_id FROM meetup_likes GROUP BY meetup_id ) I ON I.meetup_id = A.meetup_id WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.status IN ( 'RECRUITING', 'CLOSED')
AND A.status = #{status}
AND A.title LIKE '%' || #{adminSearchText} || '%'
AND B.nickname LIKE'%' || #{adminSearchText} || '%'
AND A.title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
AND E.sido_id = #{sidoId}
AND G.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY
A.created_at DESC
NVL(I.like_cnt,0) DESC
A.meetup_At ASC
A.created_at DESC
OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{end} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_meetup_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'RECRUITING' THEN 1 END) AS recruiting_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'CLOSED' THEN 1 END) AS closed_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'WEATHER_CANCELED' THEN 1 END) AS weather_canceled_count FROM meetups A WHERE delete_yn = 'N'
SELECT * FROM categories WHERE parent_id IS NULL
SELECT * FROM categories WHERE parent_id IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE meetups SET delete_yn = 'Y', status = 'DELETED' WHERE meetup_id = #{meetupId}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.*, B.nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetup_applications WHERE meetup_id = A.meetup_id ) AS total_participants, F.name as sido_name
FROM meetups A LEFT JOIN members B ON B.member_id = A.member_id LEFT JOIN sigungus E ON E.sigungu_id = A.sigungu_id LEFT JOIN sidos F ON F.sido_id = E.sido_id WHERE A.meetup_id = #{meetupId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT MEETUPS_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO meetups(meetup_id, member_id, title, content, max_participants, min_participants, sigungu_id, category_id, meetup_at) values(#{meetupId}, #{memberId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{maxParticipants}, #{minParticipants}, #{sigunguId}, #{categoryId}, TO_DATE(#{meetupAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI'))
mapper.update: UPDATE meetups SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, max_participants = #{maxParticipants}, min_participants = #{minParticipants}, category_id = #{categoryId}, sigungu_id = #{sigunguId}, meetup_at = TO_DATE(#{meetupAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI'), status = #{status} WHERE meetup_id = #{meetupId}
UPDATE meetup_applications SET status = 'PENDING' WHERE 1=1 AND application_id = #{applicationId}
UPDATE meetup_applications SET status = 'CANCELED' WHERE 1=1 AND application_id = #{applicationId}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetup_applications WHERE meetup_id = A.meetup_id ) AS total_participants,
TO_CHAR(A.meetup_At, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as fomatMeetupAt, TO_CHAR(A.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as fomatcreatedAt,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetups WHERE member_id = A.member_id ) AS meetupTotalCount
FROM meetups A WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY A.created_at DESC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{end} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetups A WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY A.created_at DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(B.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as apply_at,
B.reject_reason, B.member_id AS apply_member_id, B.status AS apply_status, C.nickname, TO_CHAR(A.meetup_At, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as fomatMeetupAt, A.* FROM meetup_applications B JOIN meetups A ON A.meetup_id = B.meetup_id JOIN members C ON C.member_id = B.member_id WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.status != 'DELETED' AND B.status != 'CANCELED' AND B.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY A.created_at DESC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{end} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetup_applications B JOIN meetups A ON A.meetup_id = B.meetup_id JOIN members C ON C.member_id = B.member_id WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.status != 'DELETED' AND B.status != 'CANCELED' AND B.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY A.created_at DESC

SELECT C.nickname, TO_CHAR(B.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS apply_at, B.status AS apply_status, A.meetup_id, B.member_id, B.application_id FROM meetups A JOIN meetup_applications B ON B.meetup_id = A.meetup_id JOIN members C ON C.member_id = B.member_id WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.status != 'DELETED' AND B.status != 'CANCELED' AND A.meetup_id = #{meetupId} ORDER BY B.created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO images ( image_id, image_path) VALUES
(#{img.imageId}, #{img.imagePath, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
